channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump Grants Pardons to Six Individuals Convicted of Emissions Tampering
item.description: President Donald Trump announced pardons for six individuals convicted of tampering with vehicle emissions controls, framing their cases as political persecution under the Biden administration. The mo...

item.title: Southern Africa's High-Capacity Fiber Corridor Activated
item.description: A major telecommunications infrastructure project linking Botswana, Zimbabwe, Zambia, and South Africa has officially launched, creating a high-capacity fiber-optic network that enhances digital conne...

item.title: Nigeria's CNG Bus Project Faces Transparency Scrutiny Amid Budget Discrepancies
item.description: The article details the procurement of 50 CNG buses for Nigeria's modern city bus transportation system, highlighting concerns over transparency and budget allocation. Despite a combined budgetary pro...

item.title: Pastor Ezekiel Warns of Potential Famine in Kenya Due to Poor Harvests and Drought
item.description: Pastor Ezekiel Odero, founder of New Life Prayer Centre and Church, has sparked debate by predicting Kenya could face a severe famine in 2027 due to poor harvests and lack of rainfall. During a sermon...

item.title: Turkey leverages close U.S.-Turkish relations for strategic advantage at NATO summit
item.description: The article discusses Turkey's potential strategic advantage in the upcoming NATO summit, attributed to President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan's strong relationship with former U.S. President Donald Trump. Wh...

item.title: DepEd outlines strict penalties for fake news and bomb threats in schools
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) has issued a reminder to students, parents, and the public about the serious consequences of spreading fake news, staging disruptive pranks, and making bomb threats...

item.title: SARS auto-assessment process explained for taxpayers
item.description: The South African Revenue Service (SARS) has initiated its auto-assessment process for tax returns, affecting at least six million taxpayers. This system calculates tax obligations using data from thi...

item.title: PNP officers disciplined for sexual harassment and failure to protect motorist
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has disciplined two officers for misconduct, including one who sexually harassed a minor and another who failed to protect a motorist during a public rally. The in...

item.title: UK Plans to Build 14 Small Modular Reactors to Supply 4.2 GW of Power by 2034
item.description: A private consortium led by European SMR developer SGE has unveiled plans to construct 14 small modular nuclear reactors (SMRs) across three UK sites, aiming to add 4.2 gigawatts (GW) of nuclear capac...

item.title: Sukkur-Hyderabad M-6 Motorway Project Divided into Five Sections
item.description: The Sukkur-Hyderabad Motorway (M-6) project, a multi-billion-rupee initiative scheduled to start in the current fiscal year, has been divided into five sections during a meeting of the National Assemb...

item.title: Nigeria's D’Tigers Overcome Challenges to Secure Victory in FIBA Qualifier
item.description: Nigeria's senior men's basketball team, D’Tigers, delivered a dramatic comeback victory against Guinea in the FIBA Basketball World Cup African Qualifiers, securing their second consecutive win. The g...

item.title: Families of Drug War Victims Push SC to Declare Campaign Unconstitutional
item.description: Families of drug war victims have renewed their demand for the Supreme Court (SC) to resolve a pending petition seeking to declare Oplan Double Barrel, the Duterte administration's anti-drug campaign,...

item.title: Tanzania and Mozambique Push for African Free Trade Area to Boost Economic Growth
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan and Mozambique's President Daniel Francisco Chapo urged African nations to accelerate the implementation of the African Continental Free Trade Area (AfCFTA) to achieve ec...

item.title: Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial: Key Prosecutors and Their Roles
item.description: The article discusses the 26 prosecutors involved in the impeachment trial of Sara Duterte, the daughter of former President Duterte. The trial, which is a significant political event in the Philippin...

item.title: Adele discusses her son and career in a rare interview
item.description: Adele has opened up about her personal life and career in a rare interview, addressing her son Angelo, 13, and her reflections on her music career. The singer, known for her powerful vocals and emotio...

item.title: Canada's Trade Strategy with the US: Balancing Concessions and Leverage
item.description: The article outlines Canada's approach to navigating complex trade negotiations with the United States, emphasizing strategic concessions and leveraging key economic assets. It highlights the importan...

item.title: PM Shehbaz's Official Visit to Turkey Focuses on Bilateral Relations and Regional Cooperation
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif arrived in Istanbul on Friday for an official visit to Turkey, invited by President Recep Tayyip Erdogan. The visit follows his attendance at the funeral of Iranian Supre...

item.title: Yanga faces Sh100 million fine and ethics panel referral for dressing room breach
item.description: Young Africans (Yanga) have been fined Sh100 million by the Tanzania Premier League Board (TPLB) after their players and technical staff used a house outside the stadium instead of the designated dres...

item.title: Digital Tools Fuel Nigerian SME Growth
item.description: The article highlights the resilience and ambition of Nigerian micro, small, and medium-sized enterprises (MSMEs), which form the backbone of Nigeria's economy. With nearly 40 million MSMEs, these bus...

item.title: eThekwini municipality urges relocation of repatriation services to Musina
item.description: The eThekwini municipality has issued a public appeal to cease dropping off undocumented foreign nationals at the decommissioned repatriation site in Durban, emphasizing that all repatriation services...
